title: Serious Player Animations - Pierced Animations
description: Better Vanilla Animations for Serious Player Animations Mod, by PierceTH
body:
This resource pack adds the basic living motions to the [Serious Player Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/serious-player-animations) Mod!

Prev:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/KJLfU0ymB0w" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

It adds >

Idle
Run
Walk
Sneak

And their respective variations.

The resource pack is meant to be used along with Better Combat Mod for better usage of the tools. This Resource Pack aims to make players' animations feel GOOD!
